creator: riggs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Submitted and committed in the course of bug #222474

This report did not show up in the "Ports bugs, that do not have been looked at yet" query on the Dashboard (presumably because dbaio@ had alread edited it), otherwise I would have merged it with #222474 earlier. My apologies.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 222474 ***
